message:
test: add Chain read_to_end regression, rate-limit repro, and strengthen existing tests

New tests:
- tests/chain_bug.rs: regression test for io::Chain::read_to_end
  verifying that data from both chained readers is collected correctly
  when the first reader exhausts mid-buffer.
- tests/repro_service_rate_limit.rs: reproduction test for rate-limit
  readiness wakeup behavior under fixed time, verifying that a
  rate-limited service correctly wakes waiters after the refill period.

Existing test improvements:
- lab_determinism.rs: additional seed-stability assertions
- property tests (geodesic, outcome_time, region_ops, trace_ids,
  ws_frame): added missing init_test/test_complete markers for
  consistent test lifecycle tracking
- calm_saga_integration, frankenlab_integration,
  obligation_proof_integration, e2e_t6_data_path: added missing
  lifecycle markers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
